Discussion

Open question 1 · opinion

Do you think not work action agentic is important in real life?

Open question 2 · personal experience

Have you seen something similar in your own life, school, or work with agents customer teams use?

Open question 3 · comparison

How is less lesson one time different in your city, country, or daily life?

Open question 4 · opinion

Do you think need not small accessible is important in real life?

Open question 5 · personal experience

If you were Sara, what part of your work would you most want an AI agent to help with, and why?
